## Problem

What's the gap or friction you're running into?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant (links, screenshots, related issues). Check the
[roadmap](../../README.md#roadmap) first — this may already be planned.
